## Type

<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] New ADR or revision of an existing one

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (typecheck + lint)
- [ ] `pnpm run test` passes (15+ tests)
- [ ] Hands-on tested in the Extension Development Host (F5)
- [ ] If touching `.openui` examples: validated with the `openui-lang` skill validator (install via `npx skills@latest add ginaphi/skills`)

## Documentation

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the appropriate version section
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
